roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:APPEARANCE BY RALPH SIVILLA, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL FORTHE PEOPLE,/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 4D/CTS:4/WS/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH INDIVIDUAL TREATMENT AND REHABILITATION PLANAS DIRECTED BY ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION TO VICTIM WELLS FARGO BANK IN THE  AMOUNT OF $17,500 PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/X:RESTITUTION OWED SHALL BE JOINT AND SEVERAL WITH CO-DEFENDANTS,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/BE/

/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:RALPH SIVILLA DEP ATTORNEY GENERAL APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE PEOPLE/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO ADD COUNT 2 32PCF IS GRANTED/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:002/DISM3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:11-09-11/ARBUCKLE/X:DEFT TO PAY RESTITUTION TO WELLS FARGO BANK IN THE AMOUNT OF $17500 JOINT & SEVERAL WITH OTHER DEFTS/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:RALPH SIVILLA APPEARS SPECIALLY FOR THE ATTORNEY GENERALL'S OFFICE/STWPX/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 09-21-11/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, DOP/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP/

/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY RALPH SIVILLA DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:MICHAEL WHELAN/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:FORPRELIMINARY HEARING IS 09-22-11/X:MOTION TO REDUCE BAIL/MO GRTD/BAIL:50000/CONTD:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/CONTD:PRELIM HRG/DOP/
/CAL:APD PC1203,9PC TRANSFER FROM SF TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION TRANSFERRED FROM SF TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/X:ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/
